text:
なるほど……強引に攻めるよりも
相手の死角を突くべきなんだな。

見てて分かったけど
あの飛びかかってくる攻撃って
案外、動きが分かり易いんだな。

やっぱり、センパイの戦い方は
すごく参考になるな。

ありがとな、センパイ。
ま

Oh, alright, so you wanna make sure
you hit 'em from their blind spots instead
of just taking'em head on, huh?

You know what I realized while watching
you go at it, though? When they leap in
to attack like that, it's not actually all that
hard to read.

Watching you do your thing really opens
my eyes up to a lot.

Thanks again, boss.
I hope you'll help me out again sometime.
